panels.description: Scientific diagram style: Cross-section anatomical view showing the Martian transition from human-like to evolved brain-heavy forms with delicate tentacles. Clinical, cool-toned lighting, detailed biology.

bubbles.text: The Martians evolved by sacrificing their bodies for intellect, becoming selfish, emotionless brains.

panels.description: Microscopic view: A sterile, glowing Martian environment void of bacteria. Contrast with a dark, cluttered visualization of Earth's diseases like viruses and tumors fading away.

bubbles.text: Unlike Earth, Mars is sterile. They eliminated all disease and contagion ages ago.

panels.description: A close-up shot of the vibrant, alien 'red weed' growing rapidly in a desolate landscape, strange pulsating textures, ethereal lighting.

bubbles.text: The red weed... a transitory, alien growth rarely witnessed by human eyes.

panels.description: First-person perspective: The narrator (hidden behind debris) watches multiple Martians performing complex mechanical tasks in complete silence. Shadows and high-contrast light.

bubbles.text: They don't communicate with sound or gesture. I have seen them work in silence for hours.

panels.description: Close up of a Martian face/head-unit, dark glowing eyes, showing a moment of intense focused, silent telepathy. Intricate alien technology embedded nearby.

bubbles.text: They interchange thoughts without physical intermediation. Their technology is their true body.
